subcodes.first_line: O God! O God! Thou dost behold me, how my forehead is laid upon the dust of humility and submission and how my face is covered
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition
